steps.title: Compare both sides
steps.content: Rewriting the right side: $-97+x^{2}=x^{2}-97$, which is identical to the left side. The equation reduces to $$x^{2}-97=x^{2}-97.$$

steps.title: Interpret the identity
steps.content: Both sides are equal for every real $x$, so the equation has infinitely many solutions. That matches choice D — D is correct.
